targets.query:
from(bucket: "benchmarks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "benchmark_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ttft_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.server == "server1")
  |> group(columns: ["tool"])
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "benchmarks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "benchmark_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ttft_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.server == "server2")
  |> group(columns: ["tool"])
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "benchmarks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "benchmark_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.server == "server1")
  |> group(columns: ["tool"])
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "benchmarks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "benchmark_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.server == "server2")
  |> group(columns: ["tool"])
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "benchmarks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "benchmark_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latency_p99_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.server == "server1")
  |> group(columns: ["tool"])
  |> mean()

panels.title: P99 Latency by Tool - Server 2 (+ aiDaptive)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "benchmarks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "benchmark_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latency_p99_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.server == "server2")
  |> group(columns: ["tool"])
  |> mean()

list.name: run_id
list.query:
from(bucket: "benchmarks")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "benchmark_results")
  |> keep(columns: ["run_id"])
  |> distinct(column: "run_id")
